title: Dream — Water Game with Hannah + 1987 Crash Question for Dad
html:
TL;DR

  • Dream fragment: Yahir is playing a water/torpedo/ball game with Hannah Crocker who "doesn't like struggling for the torpedo or ball underwater so she just takes the alley oops" — passive scoring vs. contesting the dive. Reads as a teen dream-image about effort asymmetry.
  • Adjacent grocery list (crema, leche, 3 avocado) — the note is a junk-drawer apple-note where the dream sits next to errands sit next to a serious investing question.
  • The investing question is the heavy ore: "You mentioned that you're dad predicted the 1987 crash, what similarities in his strategies do you see correlating with this one, and what things did your dad do that can be applied right now?" — Yahir is drafting an interview question for someone (likely a Ford-network mentor or Dale Selinger / Dave Selinger orbit) about generational value investing wisdom transmitted father-to-son during a crash.
  • Closes with a one-line research prompt: "What came out of the 1987 crash" — same instinct that drives 2020 03 24 exogenous event 911's "exogenous event like 911" framing. He's reading every previous crash as an analog for COVID.
  • Captured April 30, 2020 — six weeks into the pandemic, mid-COVID-watchlist era (2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist) and one week after the Munger maxims dump.

Key quotes

"You mentioned that you're dad predicted the 1987 crash, what similarities in his strategies do you see correlating with this one, and what things did your dad do that can be applied right now"

"She doesn't like struggling for the torpedo or ball underwater so she just takes the alley oops"

Open questions

  • Who is "you're dad" addressed to? The Selinger orbit is the most likely target — this looks like a question Yahir is staging for an actual conversation, not a self-prompt.
  • Hannah Crocker is the only named dream character — possible classmate. Stub gate: not crossed at one mention.

Connections

value investing · dad wisdom · covid pandemic era · grants pass teen era · 2020 03 24 exogenous event 911 · 2020 04 23 go to diamond · 2020 03 30 facebook pandemic watchlist
